Package game.item.weapon.greatknife

Class GreatKnife

java.lang.Object
edu.monash.fit2099.engine.GameEntity
edu.monash.fit2099.engine.items.Item
edu.monash.fit2099.engine.weapons.WeaponItem
game.item.weapon.greatknife.GreatKnife
All Implemented Interfaces:
Printable, Weapon, ItemBuyingPrice, ItemSellingPrice, ItemUpgrade
public class GreatKnife
extends WeaponItem
implements ItemBuyingPrice, ItemSellingPrice, ItemUpgrade

    • allowableActions

      public ActionList allowableActions​(Actor otherActor, Location location)
      Active the skill on other actor
      Overrides:
      allowableActions in class Item
      Parameters:
      otherActor - the other actor
      location - the location of the other actor
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of Actions

    • returnBuying

      public double returnBuying​(boolean option, Actor actor)
      Calculates the buying price of the item based on certain conditions.
      Specified by:
      returnBuying in interface ItemBuyingPrice
      Parameters:
      option - Determines if the item is being bought with a discount (true) or not (false).
      actor - The actor buying the item.
      Returns:
      The buying price of the item or a negative value if the item cannot be purchased due to an insufficient balance.

    • originalBuyingChance

      public boolean originalBuyingChance()
      Determines the chance of a successful purchase of the item.
      Specified by:
      originalBuyingChance in interface ItemBuyingPrice
      Returns:
      true if the purchase is successful, based on a predefined chance.

    • originalBuyingPrice

      public double originalBuyingPrice()
      Retrieves the original buying price of the item.
      Specified by:
      originalBuyingPrice in interface ItemBuyingPrice
      Returns:
      The original buying price of the item, a constant value.

    • returnSelling

      public double returnSelling​(boolean option, Actor actor)
      Calculates the selling price of the item based on certain conditions.
      Specified by:
      returnSelling in interface ItemSellingPrice
      Parameters:
      option - Determines if the item is being sold with a discount (true) or not (false).
      actor - The actor selling the item.
      Returns:
      The selling price of the item or 0.0 if the actor's balance is insufficient.

    • originalSellingChance

      public boolean originalSellingChance()
      Determines the chance of a successful sale of the item.
      Specified by:
      originalSellingChance in interface ItemSellingPrice
      Returns:
      true if the sale is successful, based on a predefined chance.

    • originalSellingPrice

      public double originalSellingPrice()
      Retrieves the original selling price of the item.
      Specified by:
      originalSellingPrice in interface ItemSellingPrice
      Returns:
      The original selling price of the item, a constant value.

    • returnUpgrading

      public double returnUpgrading​(Actor actor)
      Retrieves the upgrading price of the item.
      Specified by:
      returnUpgrading in interface ItemUpgrade
      Parameters:
      actor - The actor buying the item.
      Returns:
      The upgrading price of the item.
